title: CiteMap v3.3 (placeholder schema)
description: Placeholder JSON Schema for citemap.json v3.3. The full structural schema is scheduled for a follow-up release; this placeholder exists so the schema URL referenced in the v3.3 spec frontmatter resolves rather than 404s (matching the pattern v3.1 and v3.2 never adopted). For structural validation today, see the spec at https://github.com/citemaps/citemap/blob/main/spec/v3.3.md and the v3.0 schema at https://citemaps.org/schema/v3.0/citemap.schema.json as a structural baseline. v3.3 is purely additive over v3.2 (which was additive over v3.1, which was additive over v3.0), so v3.0-conformant documents validate against v3.3 with at most a version field bump per v3.3 §7.2.

brand.description: Primary entity identity card. See spec §4 for v3.3 constituent fields.

@graph.description: Optional v3.3 graph extension. See spec §1.3.

relationships.description: Optional v3.3 relationships array. See spec §1.4 for required edge fields (from/to/type).

_meta.fullSchemaStatus: deferred — placeholder published per established v3.1/v3.2 precedent of spec-as-authoritative-artifact
